commands.summary: fabric-hub (forgewire monorepo) checks cleanly with the new forgelink module wired into the needs_approval dispatch path.
5 fabric-hub unit tests passed: config/opt-out gating, kind->authority mapping, and the agent-governance-v1 approval-request body.

environment.process_note: AGH-028 Fabric side: fabric-hub auto-routes held HITL approvals to ForgeLink's agent-governance-v1 contract when configured/reachable, with FORGELINK_HITL opt-out and silent fallback to Fabric's built-in pane. Cross-repo; lands in the forgewire monorepo, mirrored to forgewire-fabric. Decision write-back (auto-resolving the held task from the ForgeLink decision) is the documented operational follow-up.
